name: Broth Cooked Orzo with Lemon & Parsley
recipeIngredient: 12 oz Orzo, or other small pasta
recipeInstructions:
1. Bring the vegetable stock to a boil.
2. Add the orzo and cook until al dente.
3. Drain the orzo and reserve some of the stock for later use.
4. Toss the cooked orzo with olive oil and garlic.
5. Season with lemon juice, chopped parsley, salt, and pepper.
6. Serve immediately.
